user.title: Set up Næste Syn
user.description:
Enter your MotorAPI key and your vehicle registration number.

Apply for API access at motorapi.dk.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to MotorAPI. Check your internet connection.

error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
